steps.title: Set up the increase
steps.content:
A $37.5\%$ increase means the final amount is $1.375$ times the original amount. Let $x$ be the number of sea turtles on July $1$.
$$
264=1.375x
$$

steps.title: Solve for the original amount
steps.content: Divide by $1.375$. $$ x=\frac{264}{1.375}=192 $$ The answer is A.
